name: KOALA Financial Group Limited
summary: KOALA Financial Group Limited, an investment holding company, engages in securities brokerage, share placements, underwriting, and money lending activities in Hong Kong. The company operates in four segments: Securities Brokerage, Underwriting and Placements; Money Lending; Securities Investment; and Investment in Properties. It also leases investment properties and provides asset management services. The company was formerly known as Sunrise (China) Technology Group Limited and changed its name to KOALA Financial Group Limited in June 2017. KOALA Financial Group Limited is headquartered in Wan Chai, Hong Kong.
